mapper.sql: rr.job_name, rr.dept_name, rr.expected_salary, rr.gender, rr.name, rr.id_number, rr.birthday, rr.height, rr.weight, rr.nation, rr.marital_status, rr.political, rr.mobile_phone, rr.email, rr.address, rr.zipcode, rr.native_place, rr.original_contract_flag, rr.occupational_diseases_flag, rr.confidentiality_restrictions_flag, rr.health_flag, rr.relationship_flag, rr.relationship_name, rr.relationship, rr.relationship_dept_name, rr.entry_time, rr.recruitment_flag, rr.attribute1, rr.attribute2, rr.attribute3, rr.attribute4, rr.attribute5, rr.enabled_flag, rr.id, rr.create_by, rr.update_time, rr.update_by, rr.create_time, rr.employee_id as pe_id, rr.emergency_contact_name,rr.emergency_contact_phone

${tAlias}.job_name as ${tAlias}_job_name, ${tAlias}.dept_name as ${tAlias}_dept_name, ${tAlias}.expected_salary as ${tAlias}_expected_salary, ${tAlias}.gender as ${tAlias}_gender, ${tAlias}.name as ${tAlias}_name, ${tAlias}.id_number as ${tAlias}_id_number, ${tAlias}.birthday as ${tAlias}_birthday, ${tAlias}.height as ${tAlias}_height, ${tAlias}.weight as ${tAlias}_weight, ${tAlias}.nation as ${tAlias}_nation, ${tAlias}.marital_status as ${tAlias}_marital_status, ${tAlias}.political as ${tAlias}_political, ${tAlias}.mobile_phone as ${tAlias}_mobile_phone, ${tAlias}.email as ${tAlias}_email, ${tAlias}.address as ${tAlias}_address, ${tAlias}.zipcode as ${tAlias}_zipcode, ${tAlias}.native_place as ${tAlias}_native_place, ${tAlias}.original_contract_flag as ${tAlias}_original_contract_flag, ${tAlias}.occupational_diseases_flag as ${tAlias}_occupational_diseases_flag, ${tAlias}.confidentiality_restrictions_flag as ${tAlias}_confidentiality_restrictions_flag, ${tAlias}.health_flag as ${tAlias}_health_flag, ${tAlias}.relationship_flag as ${tAlias}_relationship_flag, ${tAlias}.relationship_name as ${tAlias}_relationship_name, ${tAlias}.relationship as ${tAlias}_relationship, ${tAlias}.relationship_dept_name as ${tAlias}_relationship_dept_name, ${tAlias}.entry_time as ${tAlias}_entry_time, ${tAlias}.recruitment_flag as ${tAlias}_recruitment_flag, ${tAlias}.attribute1 as ${tAlias}_attribute1, ${tAlias}.attribute2 as ${tAlias}_attribute2, ${tAlias}.attribute3 as ${tAlias}_attribute3, ${tAlias}.attribute4 as ${tAlias}_attribute4, ${tAlias}.attribute5 as ${tAlias}_attribute5, ${tAlias}.enabled_flag as ${tAlias}_enabled_flag, ${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.employee_id as ${tAlias}_pe_id, ${tAlias}.emergency_contact_name as ${tAlias}_emergency_contact_name, ${tAlias}.emergency_contact_phone as ${tAlias}_emergency_contact_phone

select
, ISNULL(re.id, -1) re_id,
,(select pe.work_card from pm_employee pe where pe.id = rr.employee_id) as pe_work_card from re_recruitment rr outer apply ( select top(1) re_ap.* from re_education re_ap where re_ap.re_id = rr.id AND re_ap.enabled_flag = 1 AND re_ap.new_education_flag = 1 ) re
mapper.insert: insert into re_recruitment (job_name, dept_name, expected_salary, gender, name, id_number, birthday, height, weight, nation, marital_status, political, mobile_phone, email, address, zipcode, native_place, original_contract_flag, occupational_diseases_flag, confidentiality_restrictions_flag, health_flag, relationship_flag, relationship_name, relationship, relationship_dept_name, entry_time, recruitment_flag, attribute1, attribute2, attribute3, attribute4, attribute5, enabled_flag, create_by, update_time, update_by, create_time, employee_id,emergency_contact_name,emergency_contact_phone) values (#{jobName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{deptName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{expectedSalary,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{gender,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{idNumber,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{birthday,jdbcType=DATE}, #{height,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{weight,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{nation,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{maritalStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{political,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{mobilePhone,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{email,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{address,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{zipcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{nativePlace,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{originalContractFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{occupationalDiseasesFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{confidentialityRestrictionsFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{healthFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{relationshipFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{relationshipName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{relationship,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{relationshipDeptName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entryTime,jdbcType=DATE}, #{recruitmentFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute4,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute5,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{employee.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{emergencyContactName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{emergencyContactPhone,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.update: update re_recruitment set job_name = #{jobName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, dept_name = #{deptName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, expected_salary = #{expectedSalary,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, gender = #{gender,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, name = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, id_number = #{idNumber,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, birthday = #{birthday,jdbcType=DATE}, height = #{height,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, weight = #{weight,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, nation = #{nation,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, marital_status = #{maritalStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, political = #{political,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, mobile_phone = #{mobilePhone,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, email = #{email,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, address = #{address,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, zipcode = #{zipcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, native_place = #{nativePlace,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, original_contract_flag = #{originalContractFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, occupational_diseases_flag = #{occupationalDiseasesFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, confidentiality_restrictions_flag = #{confidentialityRestrictionsFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, health_flag = #{healthFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, relationship_flag = #{relationshipFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, relationship_name = #{relationshipName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, relationship = #{relationship,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, relationship_dept_name = #{relationshipDeptName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, entry_time = #{entryTime,jdbcType=DATE}, recruitment_flag = #{recruitmentFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, attribute1 = #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute2 = #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute3 = #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute4 = #{attribute4,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute5 = #{attribute5,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, enabled_flag = #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, employee_id = #{employee.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, emergency_contact_name = #{emergencyContactName,jdbcType=BIGINT}, emergency_contact_phone = #{emergencyContactPhone,jdbcType=BIGINT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.insert: insert into re_recruitment(job_name, dept_name, gender, name, id_number, birthday, height, weight, nation, marital_status, political, mobile_phone, email, address, native_place, original_contract_flag, occupational_diseases_flag, confidentiality_restrictions_flag, health_flag, relationship_flag, relationship_name, relationship, relationship_dept_name, entry_time, recruitment_flag, attribute4, attribute5, enabled_flag, create_by, update_time, update_by, create_time, employee_id, expected_salary,emergency_contact_name,emergency_contact_phone) select rrti.job_name, rrti.dept_name, rrti.gender, rrti.name, rrti.id_number, rrti.birthday, rrti.height, rrti.weight, rrti.nation, rrti.marital_status, rrti.political, rrti.mobile_phone, rrti.email, rrti.address, rrti.native_place, rrti.original_contract_flag, rrti.occupational_diseases_flag, rrti.confidentiality_restrictions_flag, rrti.health_flag, rrti.relationship_flag, rrti.relationship_name, rrti.relationship, rrti.relationship_dept_name, rrti.entry_time, 0, rrti.id, rrti.group_id, 1, rrti.create_by, rrti.update_time, rrti.update_by, rrti.create_time, -1, rrti.expected_salary, rrti.emergency_contact_name,rrti.emergency_contact_phone from re_recruitment_temp_interface rrti where rrti.group_id = #{groupId, jdbcType = BIGINT} and rrti.data_status = 'T'
